original_image_tags: A carbon copy of a telegram printed on blue-green paper. The paper shows two hole-punch marks at the top center. There are two white rectangular adhesive tabs or patches near the top holes. The telegram has a standard teletype layout with printed text and various handwritten annotations, stamps, and routing markings.

elements.description: Typed document with handwritten annotations and stamps. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree that the page contains no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts, and only mentions typed/handwritten content, so there are no visual elements to contradict.
